page.title: Duk abin da ya faru
page.description: Gayyace-gayyace, gudummawa, biyan kuɗi, da duk abin da ke faruwa a asusunka.

settings.title: Saitunan sanarwa
settings.description: Zaɓi yawan saƙonnin da kake son karɓa daga MoolaHub.

everything.label: Kome
everything.description: Dukan sanarwoyi: ayyukan da'ira, matakan buri, ajiyar kuɗi, tunatarwa, da shawarwari.

essential.label: Mahimmanci
essential.description: Sabbin bayanai masu muhimmanci kaɗai, kamar biyan kuɗi, ranakun ƙarshe na gudummawa, da ayyukan asusu.

minimal.label: Kaɗan
minimal.description: Sanarwoyi mafi muhimmanci na asusu da kuɗi kaɗai.

custom.label: Naka
custom.description: Zaɓi ainihin rukunonin da kake son samun sanarwa akai.

money.label: Kuɗi da ma'amaloli
money.description: Ajiya, cirewa, biyan kuɗi, da tunatarwar gudummawa.

social.label: Tanadin ƙungiya da zamantakewa
social.description: Gayyace-gayyace, ayyukan mambobi, da sabbin bayanan da'ira.

engagement.label: Shawarwari da haɗin kai
engagement.description: Jerin ci gaba, tunatarwar koyo, da labaran samfur.

notFound.title: Ba a sami shafin ba
notFound.description: Shafin da kake nema babu shi ko watakila an matsar da shi.
